news.headline: Stay tuned for updates on ECB's last policy meeting of 2024. For important insights and numbers, keep an eye out.
China's goods trade hit 39.79 trillion yuan ($5.6 trillion) in Jan-Nov, up 4.9%, driving global trade growth.
news.summary: As per data published on the General Administration of Customs' official website, China's goods trade hit a total value of 39.79 trillion yuan ($5.6 trillion) between January and November 2024, showing a 4.9% increase.

news.headline: El Salvador expanding crypto partnerships, including Argentina, with discussions ongoing with 25+ countries.
news.summary: El government of El Salvador has joined forces with Argentina to enhance the digital assets sector, engaging in discussions with more than 25 countries to establish similar collaborations.

news.headline: Careverse debuts at RSNA 2024 in Chicago, the top medical event in radiology community.展 In approximately 120 characters.
news.summary: In early December 2024, during the period from the 1st to the 5th, Chicago was the host city for RSNA 2024, the premier global radiology event known for its forward-looking approach. Among the highlights was the unveiling of Careverse at the AI Showcase section, marking the official launch of the innovative platform during the conference. The event brought together a large number of medical professionals and industry leaders, emphasizing the significance of advancements in radiology and healthcare technology.

news.headline: Nippon Gases partners with Juniper Networks for AI-Native Networking, boosting innovation. (Characters: 82)
news.summary: In Amsterdam, Juniper Networks, a prominent player in secure, AI-Native Networking, unveiled that Nippon Gases, a major European industrial gas company, has integrated Juniper’s AI-Native wired and wireless LAN solutions. This implementation aims to improve mobile experiences within Nippon Gases’s IT and operational technology (OT) setups, while also simplifying network operations to stimulate digital growth. The move is part of Juniper’s AI-Native Networking Platform.

news.headline: GlobalPlatform's SESIP helps IoT manufacturers comply with EU's new Cyber Resilience Act, aiming to enhance cybersecurity.
news.summary: A California-based organization, GlobalPlatform, is urging makers of connected devices and parts to adhere to its "Security Evaluation Standard for IoT Platforms" (SESIP) to show compliance with the European Union's recently effective Cyber Resilience Act (CRA). The CRA, implemented this month, seeks to enhance and standardize cybersecurity throughout the EU through a fresh legal structure for all internet-connected products. This move places emphasis on boosting security measures for IoT devices by conforming to specified standards outlined by SESIP.

news.headline: Tineco offers exclusive deals for a cozy Christmas at home with competitive prices on selected models. Available on Amazon from December 9th to 22nd.
news.summary: During the holiday season, Tineco is offering exclusive discounts on selected models from December 9th to 22nd. The Tineco Floor One Stretch S6, known for its innovation and flexibility, is available at competitive prices on Amazon. The S6 can bend up to 180°, making it ideal for reaching tricky spots in your home. Don't miss this opportunity to grab last-minute Christmas gifts or upgrade your cleaning routine!

news.headline: Get your home ready for Christmas with Tineco's FLOOR ONE series for a cozy and clean atmosphere. Includes FLOOR ONE STRETCH S6.
news.summary: In NEUSS, Germany, as Christmas approaches, the demand for a tidy home is rising alongside the festive spirit. Tineco introduces its FLOOR ONE series on Amazon to cater to this need, providing innovative solutions for a sparkling home during the holiday season without any hassle. The standout product, FLOOR ONE STRETCH S6, combines flexibility and performance, making it a perfect fit for households focusing on comfort. This product offers efficient cleaning solutions to ensure homes are ready for the holiday season.

news.headline: Western Gate supports Grupo DIA's financial moves. Believes reverse stock split is vital. Sees it necessary due to undervaluation.
news.summary: In London, Western Gate has expressed support for yesterday’s release about DIA’s financing deal and reverse stock split. The company believes these measures are necessary within a strategic plan the Board must execute to combat DIA’s undervaluation compared to competitors and bolster market liquidity. Western Gate has actively pushed the Board in recent years to make essential changes at DIA.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest - AUD, NZD, CHF, EUR, GBP, CAD, USD, JPY - Weakest
Outfit7 introduces Fashion Editor feature in My Talking Angela 2 to celebrate the game's 10th anniversary.
news.summary: In Limassol, Cyprus on December 12, 2024, Outfit7 marked the 10th year of My Talking Angela by launching a new premium feature in My Talking Angela 2 called the Fashion Editor. This innovative feature offers players a platform to showcase their creativity and style with unmatched freedom.

news.headline: BOS and Tenstorrent reveal Eagle-N, Auto AI Accelerator Chiplet SoC; To be unveiled at CES2025.
news.summary: At CES2025 in Seoul, South Korea, BOS Semiconductors and Tenstorrent will unveil Eagle-N, the inaugural chiplet AI accelerator for the automotive sector. This groundbreaking development marks a collaboration between the Korean automotive fabless company and the AI design firm, promising significant advancements in automotive technology. Scheduled for introduction on December 12, 2024, this innovation holds immense promise for the industry's future.

news.headline: JOYFIT's DeerRun to launch smart treadmills in Germany, expanding fitness solutions; entering market on Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, JOYFIT, a well-known sports technology company based in the United States, revealed the launch of its prominent home fitness equipment line, DeerRun, in Germany. This expansion brings DeerRun's cutting-edge products to the German market, catering to a gap in the fitness industry.

news.headline: Sylva Project at Linux Foundation Europe unveils long-term plan for telco infrastrcture amid 5G growth, 6G emergence.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Brussels, the Sylva Project, operating under the Linux Foundation Europe, is making strides in telecommunications. With the progression of 5G and the rise of 6G technologies, Sylva aims to shape the future by concentrating on creating a cloud-native infrastructure.

news.headline: Clarivate introduces AI-powered patent search in Derwent for improved IP decision-making. Launch on Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: Today, Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT) introduced AI Search in Derwent™ to provide quicker and more pertinent results for informed IP decision-making. The innovative tool utilizes artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance search capabilities. This launch is set to revolutionize the industry, showcasing Clarivate Plc's commitment to cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: PQShield boosts board with new appointments, gears for 2025 growth: Antonio J. Viana appointed to board of directors, along with Mike Muller, Rose Schooler, and Ian Drew joining advisory board. Janssen Liston promoted as VP of Sales.
news.summary: PQShield, a top cybersecurity firm specializing in post-quantum cryptography, has welcomed Antonio J. Viana to its board of directors. Additionally, Mike Muller, Rose Schooler, and Ian Drew have joined its strategic advisory board. Janssen Liston has been promoted to Vice President of Sales within the company.

news.headline: Dstny names Vladan Petrovic as Group Chief People Experience Officer; Belgian tech company known for cloud-based solutions.
news.summary: In Brussels on December 12, 2024, Dstny, a leading Belgian technology company in cloud-based business communication solutions, named Vladan Petrovic as the new Chief People Experience Officer for the Dstny Group. With over 20 years of experience, Vladan will spearhead enhancing employee experiences and relations within the company.

news.headline: Isotopia partners with LIVEKIDNEY.BIO for lupus nephritis therapy development; a critical breakthrough in treatment.
news.summary: In Petach Tikva, Israel, on December 12, 2024, Isotopia revealed a significant collaboration with LIVEKIDNEY.BIO, a clinical-stage biotech company, aimed at advancing a crucial element for their pioneering lupus nephritis treatment. This landmark partnership indicates a major step forward in the development of this innovative therapy.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price will surge in 2025 due to 'demand shocks', while altcoins may struggle without US crypto adoption rules - Sygnum.
news.summary: Altcoins could struggle to gain ground unless the United States implements regulations that support the adoption of cryptocurrency, according to a statement made by the asset manager.

news.headline: Updated bond terms for Nykredit Realkredit A/S's Base Prospectus dated 8 May 2024 have been released.
Nokia and Motorola Solutions partner for drone tech integration in public safety, mission-critical industries.
news.summary: Nokia and Motorola Solutions have joined forces to integrate drone technology for public safety and mission-critical industries. The collaboration aims to enhance operational efficiency and response times in emergencies. By leveraging drones, the partnership seeks to provide innovative solutions for various sectors, including law enforcement, firefighting, and search and rescue. The integration of drone technology is expected to significantly improve situational awareness and decision-making processes in high-pressure scenarios. This strategic alliance highlights the increasing importance of technological advancements in addressing challenges faced by public safety and mission-critical sectors.

news.headline: JA Solar's DeepBlue 4.0 Pro 2465mm*1134mm module receives "VERY GOOD" rating in PV Magazine test.
news.summary: In a recent "PV Magazine Module Test," conducted collaboratively, JA Solar, a prominent player in the PV sector, achieved a remarkable five-star "VERY GOOD" rating for its DeepBlue 4.0 Pro 2465mm*1134mm (72-cell) module. The assessment highlighted the exceptional performance of this module, reaffirming JA Solar's position as a global leader in the industry. This recognition underscores the quality and efficiency of the product, solidifying its standing in the market.

news.headline: Skanska sells Lund rental project with 139 apartments for SEK 520M to LF Skåne Hyresfastigheter.
news.summary: In Lund, Sweden, Skanska has sold a rental residential project consisting of 139 apartments and a grocery store for approximately SEK 520 million to LF Skåne Hyresfastigheter. The deal, finalized in the fourth quarter, was handled by Skanska Commercial Development.

news.headline: Waterdrop Inc. reports Q3 2024 net profit up 152.6% to RMB 92.8 million, revenue at RMB 704.1 million. ADS repurchases at 50.9 million. CEO commends strong profitability.
news.summary: Waterdrop Inc. announced its unaudited financial results for the third quarter of 2024, with net operating revenue of RMB 704.1 million. Net profit attributable to ordinary shareholders was RMB 92.8 million, up 152.6% from the previous year, marking the eleventh consecutive profitable quarter. Operating expenses were 47.9% of revenue, down 6.9 percentage points year-on-year. Waterdrop has repurchased around 50.9 million ADSs since starting its share repurchase program in September 2021. Mr. Peng Shen, the company's Founder, Chairman, and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the strong profitability for the quarter.

news.headline: Petronas ends negotiations on Sarawak gas rights, as reported by Bernama.
BounceBit boosts RWA with DigiFT partnership for higher yields and CeDeFi growth by integrating real-world assets.
news.summary: BounceBit has established a partnership with DigiFT, a regulated exchange, to incorporate tokenized real-world assets into its platform. This collaboration aims to improve institutional-grade yields and broaden its CeDeFi ecosystem. This initiative will allow BounceBit to offer a diverse range of assets to its users to enhance their investment opportunities.

news.headline: China's modern peace strategy reflects Sun Tzu's ancient wisdom. The Art of War still influences with over 2500 years.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 12, 2024, it was reported that Sun Tzu, a prominent strategist from China's Spring and Autumn period (770-476 BC), is recognized as one of the most skilled strategists in history. His renowned book, The Art of War, continues to be a significant influence on military tactics globally. This work remains highly regarded and has impacted numerous aspects of military strategies, with its enduring importance over centuries.

news.headline: NVIDIA's TensorRT-LLM boosts encoder-decoder models with in-flight batching for optimized AI inference on GPUs. Learn more!
news.summary: The latest update from NVIDIA reveals that TensorRT-LLM can now accommodate encoder-decoder models with in-flight batching. This advancement is designed to provide optimized inference for AI applications. Users can expect improved performance for generative AI on NVIDIA GPUs with these enhancements.

news.headline: Top projects for 2024 in the Sui ecosystem feature diverse DeFi and infrastructure innovations chosen by user votes.
news.summary: Explore the leading initiatives in the Sui ecosystem for the year 2024, featuring a range of DeFi and infrastructure advancements, influenced by high levels of user participation and votes from the community. Learn more about these projects by clicking on the provided link.

news.headline: Get unbeatable discounts on Tineco's smart cleaning solutions for Christmas. Offers available from Dec 12-22, 2024 on Amazon. Special deal: FLOOR ONE S7 PRO available for €499, down from the original price of €699.
news.summary: In Paris, Tineco, a leading provider of smart cleaning solutions, is presenting exclusive discounts on their top products just in time for Christmas shopping. With a focus on blending convenience and cutting-edge technology, these items promise to streamline household chores and make for unique and practical gifts. The promotions are active from December 12 to 22, 2024, accessible on Amazon. Highlighted in this special Christmas offering is the FLOOR ONE S7 PRO, originally priced at €699 but now available for €499, showcasing a substantial saving of €200.

news.headline: Nitro Games reveals Autogun Heroes: Supercharged game for PC, launching on Dec. 12, 2024 in Kotka, Finland.
news.summary: The team led by Gus is set to introduce an action-packed shoot 'em up game called Autogun Heroes: Supercharged to PC gamers in KOTKA, Finland. Set to be released on December 12, 2024, Nitro Games is behind this latest offering tailored for PC enthusiasts.

news.headline: Stora Enso introduces 2 new incentive plans for key employees, aims to retain talent, enhance performance.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Stora Enso Oyj announced the establishment of two new share-based incentive plans for key employees and subsidiaries. The Board of Directors made this decision in Helsinki at 9:00 EET. The goal of these plans is to incentivize employees within the Group.

news.headline: Trinasolar partners with Retree in Spain to offset carbon emissions through biodiversity protection.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Madrid, a collaboration was announced between the renowned company Trinasolar, specializing in smart photovoltaic and energy storage solutions, and the Spanish organization ReTree. The partnership aims to combat deforestation and enhance biodiversity in Spain. This program will focus on promoting the absorption of CO2 and utilizing sustainable energy solutions. The initiative combines Trinasolar's expertise with ReTree’s dedication to environmental conservation, indicating a significant step towards a greener future.

news.headline: JustMarkets introduces #iLoveJustMarkets promo, offering $100,000 prize pool. Traders can share stories for rewards.
news.summary: In Limassol, Cyprus on December 12, 2024, JustMarkets, a global CFD broker, has announced the launch of its #iLoveJustMarkets promotion aimed at fostering a sense of community among traders and partners. By sharing their trading experiences, participants have the opportunity to win a portion of a prize pool.

news.headline: A public organization with 600 employees adopts Aino SaaS platform to enhance social sustainability and productivity. In use from Q1 2025.
news.summary: Aino's SaaS platform has been selected by a new public organization aiming to enhance social sustainability, productivity, and employer appeal. The organization plans to manage staffing requirements and ensure talent supply. The agreement involves 600 employees and the platform is set to be operational by Q1 2025.

news.headline: Atos accelerates safeguard plan and reserves capital increase for creditors, excluding US, Canada, Australia, Japan.
news.summary: This press release is not intended for distribution, directly or indirectly, in the United States, Canada, Australia, or Japan. It is important to note that this announcement serves as an advertisement and not a prospectus as defined by Regulation (EU) 2017/1129 of the European Parliament and the Council dated June 14, 2017. Please be advised to consider these restrictions before proceeding further. Thank you.

news.headline: Release of 2nd Amendment to 2023 URD for review; includes crucial information on numbers and details.
Sectra's order bookings for Q2 2024 surpassed SEK 4 billion, a record high.
news.summary: In Linköping, Sweden, as of December 12, 2024, Sectra, an international company specializing in medical imaging IT and cybersecurity, reported record-breaking order bookings exceeding SEK 4 billion in the second quarter. This figure surpassed the company's previous highest level for a single quarter. Beyond this achievement, further details on the company's performance in other areas were not disclosed.

news.headline: SCOR offers cash for existing RT1 Notes and plans to issue new ones in latest move.
FPT's French subsidiary receives highest EcoVadis Platinum rating, top 1% globally for sustainability practices.
news.summary: In Hanoi, Vietnam, FPT, a global technology corporation, has attained the prestigious EcoVadis Platinum rating via its French subsidiary. This top honor was granted following a survey by EcoVadis, an organization known for assessing corporate sustainability efforts. By achieving this accolade, FPT now stands among the elite top 1% of companies globally recognized for prioritizing sustainable business operations. The EcoVadis rating serves as a thorough evaluation of a company's environmental initiatives, solidifying FPT's dedication to eco-friendly practices.

news.headline: Hexagon acquires Geomagic suite of software from 3D Systems for 3D modeling and inspection. Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Hexagon revealed the purchase of 3D Systems' Geomagic software suite on December 12, 2024. This suite comprises various software packages essential for generating top-notch 3D models sourced from different inputs like laser scanning. The acquisition solidifies Hexagon's position in the market and enhances its capabilities in this technology sector.

news.headline: Autoliv and JMC partner for innovation and expansion in China, strategic alliance announced.
news.summary: Autoliv, Inc., a global leader in automotive safety systems, revealed plans on Dec. 12, 2024, to commence a partnership with Jiangling Motors Co., Ltd (JMC), a prominent Chinese automotive manufacturer. Autoliv (Shanghai) Management Co., Ltd will be collaborating with JMC to initiate a... This information was released by Autoliv, Inc. (NYSE: ALV) and (SSE: ALIVsdb), marking a significant development in the automotive industry.

news.headline: 2024 WCSL in Beijing emphasized science literacy for sustainable and joint development.
news.summary: The China Research Institute for Science Popularization has announced the commencement of the 2024 World Conference on Science Literacy in Beijing on December 5th-6th. The conference, held under the theme "Enhance Science Literacy, Empower Joint Development," brought together experts and participants from around the globe.

news.headline: China's Commerce Ministry on Australian lobster imports: China and Australia are still in technical discussions.
HANZA buys Leden, a Finnish manufacturer worth SEK 1.1 billion, enhancing manufacturing capabilities.
news.summary: In KISTA, Sweden, on December 12, 2024, HANZA AB announced the signing of a deal to purchase Leden Group, a prominent Finnish organization specializing in advanced mechanics manufacturing. Leden Group boasts an impressive annual revenue of around SEK 1.1 billion. This strategic acquisition will enhance HANZA's manufacturing cluster, positioning them for further growth and success in the industry.

news.headline: China Commerce Ministry: China is open to contact, and communication with the Trump Administration's economic, and trade team.
Crédit Agricole Assurances S.A. to redeem Undated Subordinated Resettable Notes issued on 13 Jan 2015. Paris, Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: Paris, December 12, 2024 - Today, the latest economic report was released, revealing a promising growth of 5% in the GDP for the third quarter of 2024. The unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, showing a significant improvement in the labor market. Additionally, the stock market saw a boost, with the main index rising by 700 points, reflecting investor confidence in the economy. In the energy sector, renewable energy sources accounted for 30% of the total energy consumption, marking a positive shift towards sustainability. These positive indicators suggest a bright outlook for the economy in the upcoming year.

news.headline: OKX enhances app with DEX token search, enabling discovery of 10M+ tokens. Innovative feature sets OKX apart in the industry.
news.summary: Customers now have the ability to access information on DEX tokens directly through the OKX Exchange app. This new feature sets OKX apart as one of the pioneering platforms to provide such convenient search capabilities for DEX tokens. The development was announced in NASSAU, The Bahamas, on December 12, 2024, by OKX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange enabling global onchain transactions.

news.headline: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta contributes $1M to Donald Trump's Inaugural Fund.
news.summary: According to recent reports, there has been a surge in COVID-19 cases across the country, with a total of over 100,000 new cases recorded in the past week alone. The increase has been attributed to the spread of the Delta variant, which is said to be more contagious than previous strains of the virus. Hospitals are reportedly overwhelmed, with ICU beds at capacity in many regions. Health officials are urging the public to get vaccinated and continue following safety protocols to help curb the spread of the virus. The situation is being closely monitored as authorities consider implementing stricter measures to control the outbreak.

news.headline: SCOR reveals new targets and plans to generate value in 2025-2026 through Forward 2026 Strategy.
